chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No.D-2069 of 2014 --------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge --------------------------------------------------------------------- Hearing/Priority. 1.For hearing of CMA No.9674/2014. 2.For hearing of Main Case. 07.10.2016 Malik Naeem Iqbal & Barrister Faizan Memon, Advocates for Petitioners. Mr. Abdul Jalil Zubedi, A.A.G. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Both the petitioner have challenged their suspension orders through this Constitutional Petition but the learned counsel submits that during pendency of this petition, the inquiry has been concluded and the petitioners have been exonerated. This statement has been confirmed by the learned A.A.G. who adds that the petitioners have already been reinstated in their service. In view of this joint statement, the petition is disposed of accordingly alongwith the pending application. Judge Judge Asif
